name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci badge zip puller, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5cm high) Weight: approx. 0.9kg.
name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci badge zip puller, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5cm high) Weight: approx. 0.9kg.
Model: 782904.
Dimensions: 25.5 x 28 x 16.5cm.
Color: Blue/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods headphones, long wallet and lipstick
